tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove redundant Home Switch modpack button
Task 3: Install multi-member archive into one named container + sidecar
Task 4: Scan tags bundle members + get_bundles command
Task 5: Downloads-watcher enriches sidecar with Nexus link + version
Task 6: Frontend — render a bundle as one collapsible row
Task 9: Focused-mode bundle grouping + pack-level membership (frontend)
Task 7: Phase 1 verification gate (real Alice zip end-to-end)
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE. Automated criteria done: cargo test 275 passed/0 failed; vitest 64 files/1388 passed; real Alice zip → one container+sidecar+4 members, all bundle_id-tagged. Remaining: live in-app screenshot in both views + pack membership — handed to the dev build for the user to confirm.
